name: Research Assistant
input: Write a report covering HNSW vs. IVF-PQ vs. Flat indexes for vector retrieval. Include tradeoffs in latency, memory, and recall.
golden_output: The report should describe HNSW as high-performance for low-latency searches but memory-intensive. IVF-PQ should be described as memory-efficient but at the cost of some recall Loss. Flat should be described as the most accurate but also the slowest.
